instruction:
Add comprehensive edge case tests for `get_metrics`.


Existing tests for reference:
```r

```

The existing tests cover basic functionality. Add tests for:
1. NULL inputs to each argument
2. Empty vectors/strings: character(0), "", integer(0)
3. Boundary values: 0, 1, -1, NA, NaN, Inf
4. Invalid input types (passing numeric where character expected, etc.)
5. Missing arguments (use expect_error with class matching)
6. Very long inputs (strings > 1000 chars, vectors > 10000 elements)
context:
Package: yardstick v1.3.2.9000
Description: Tidy Characterizations of Model Performance
Function: get_metrics
Parameters: type
Test patterns used: expect_snapshot, test_that
Expectations used: expect_equal, expect_gt, expect_s3_class, expect_snapshot

Function Code:
```r
get_metrics <- function(type) {
  yardns <- asNamespace("yardstick")
  fns <- lapply(names(yardns), get, envir = yardns)
  names(fns) <- names(yardns)

  metric_types <- grep("^new_.*_metric$", names(fns), value = TRUE)
  metric_types <- gsub("(new_|_metric)", "", metric_types)
  metric_types <- sort(metric_types)
  rlang::arg_match(type, metric_types, multiple = TRUE)

  type <- paste0(type, "_metric")
  metrics <- fns[vapply(fns, inherits, what = type, FUN.VALUE = logical(1))]
  metrics <- metrics[sort(names(metrics))]

  metric_set(!!!metrics)
}
```
